Headline: #29 State street Temporary Southbound Reroute near Lafayette/71st
ShortDescription: Southbound #29 State street buses are temporarily rerouted via 69th, Wentworth, Vincennes, 75th, and Lafayette due to fire department activity.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #29 State street buses are temporarily rerouted via via 69th, Wentworth, Vincennes, 75th, and Lafayette, due to fire department activity near Lafayette/71st.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:

Headline: Southbound#9 Ashland Temporary Reroute near Ashland/80th
ShortDescription: Southbound#9 Ashland buses are temporarily rerouted due to, police activity near Ashland/80th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #9 Ashland buses are temporarily rerouted via Ashland, 79th, Damen, 83rd, Ashland then over their normal route due to, police activity near Ashland/80th.
